name: O.G.R.R. Wasp
description: The O.G.R.R. Wasp turns the base wasp's aerial pressure into an even more direct, resilient, and difficult threat to bring down. It is not just an enemy above you; it is the reason ignoring the sky stops being an option.
behavior: Its night spawn only unlocks after releasing the O.G.R.Rs. in the Scarecrow Lab. After that it appears at night above the shelves with empty jars near King Dozer and holds the exact height that lets it punish you without giving away easy windows.
interactionWithPlayer: If you do not bring it down quickly, the fight loses structure almost immediately. Its aerial pressure punishes any attempt to focus only on grounded targets far harder than the base species does.
interactionWithCreatures: It pairs especially well with slow grounded variants because it drags your attention upward while the rest closes below. It does not need to finish you itself if it has already made you lose control of the arena.
strategy: Salty is still your cleanest answer. Do not leave it alive once other enemies are active, because its aerial pressure multiplies the danger of the entire wave to a ridiculous degree.
environments: After releasing the O.G.R.Rs. in the Scarecrow Lab
Shelves with Empty Jars near King Dozer

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Sting: 50Charged Sting: 87.5Stinger Shot: 62.5 Elemental Weakness Salty(+50% Damage) Resistance Slashing(-25% Damage)-or- Explosive(-50% Damage)-or- Stabbing(-50% Damage) O.G.R.R. Wasp

abilities.name: Sting
abilities.description: A direct stinger hit used to add pressure and venom.

abilities.name: Charged Sting
abilities.description: A slower, heavier stinger attack with stronger punishment.

abilities.name: Stinger Shot
abilities.description: Fires a venomous shot from the stinger.
